annual_rate.notes: Montana prejudgment interest is 10% simple for liquidated/contract-type claims — the legal rate (MCA §31-1-106), applied via the right-to-interest statute §27-1-211. TORT prejudgment interest is instead prime + 3% — currently 9.75% (variable, reset each Jan 1) under §27-1-210. Verified 2026-07-11. Not legal advice.
